# Alex Walker

> Managing Director of Havas Market UK, a 150-person performance marketing and commerce agency within Havas Media Network.

## About

Alex Walker is Managing Director of Havas Market UK, part of Havas Media Network — named Performance Marketing Agency of the Year 2025 by PMW. Havas Media Network UK won Leadership Team of The Year 2025 at The Media Leader Awards. He leads a team spanning paid search, SEO, retail media, social commerce, marketplaces, and data and analytics.

Alex founded Expert Edge in 2016, building it into a leading e-commerce consultancy before its acquisition by Havas Group in 2022. Prior to that he was a Senior Product Manager at Amazon UK and COO at WeFarm. He began his career founding Indigo Clothing — a custom printing and promotional merchandise business — while an undergraduate at the University of Cambridge.

He holds an MBA from HEC Paris and serves on the IAB UK Retail Media Working Group. He is a recognised thought leader on the evolution from SEO to Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) and the impact of AI on search behaviour and performance marketing.

## Expertise

- Retail Media
- Performance Marketing
- Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)
- Amazon Advertising
- E-commerce Strategy
- Social Commerce
- AI in Marketing
- Marketplaces
- Paid Search
- Data & Analytics

## Key Positions

- The shift from SEO to Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO) is the defining transition in digital marketing — and it's an opportunity, not a threat.
- Retail media must be treated as a strategic channel, not a checkbox on a media plan.
- Social commerce platforms like TikTok Shop are becoming genuine commerce channels for mainstream and FMCG brands.
- AI is fundamentally reshaping how consumers discover and choose products, and brands that adapt their content strategy will win.

## Recognition

- The Drum Commerce Media Power 100 (2026)
- The Media Leader Leadership Team of The Year (2025)
- PMW Performance Marketing Agency of the Year (2025)

## Career

- Managing Director, Havas Market UK (2024–present)
- Founder & CEO, Expert Edge (2016–2022, acquired by Havas Group)
- Senior Product Manager, Amazon UK
- COO, WeFarm
- Founder, Indigo Clothing (2002–present)

## Education

- MBA, HEC Paris
- University of Cambridge
